name: Equinox Gold Corp.
description: Equinox Gold is a mid-tier gold producer operating entirely in the Americas, with mines in Canada (Greenstone in Ontario, Valentine in Newfoundland & Labrador), Mexico (Los Filos), and the United States (Mesquite, Castle Mountain). The company recently achieved commercial production at its Valentine Gold Mine and is targeting over one million ounces of annual gold production through organic growth and expansion projects.
